shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- layout ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- page ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' app/page.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"proxy\\.ts|middleware\\.ts|export function proxy|export function middleware|Proxy\" node_modules/next/dist node_modules/next/types -g '*.d.ts' -g '*.js' 2>/dev/null | head -120"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
